title: Add Elysia server adapter
summary: Adds a new Elysia (Bun-native) server adapter package under server-adapters/elysia, implementing MastraServer with auth middleware, OpenAPI generation with Scalar UI, SSE/stream support, and context middleware. Includes helper tests and an example app. Also modifies packages/server to export openapi-utils and renames storedAgentId to agentId in stored-agents handlers/schemas (a breaking change unrelated to the adapter).
maintainerNotes: Several issues need attention: (1) Has merge conflicts that must be resolved. (2) No changeset included. (3) Includes an unrelated breaking change — renames storedAgentId path param to agentId in packages/server stored-agents routes/schemas, which affects all existing server adapters. This should be split into a separate PR. (4) CodeRabbit flagged ~12 actionable issues including type-unsafe casts (sendResponse tunnels Elysia context through Response param), redundant body re-parsing in context middleware, TextEncoder instantiation per chunk, auth middleware passing full ctx instead of Request to authorize, and misleading JSDoc on cache-clearing. (5) CI checks are stuck in PENDING (likely because fork PRs can't trigger secrets-dependent CI). (6) Dev script requires Bun runtime ("bun --watch") which is reasonable for Elysia but differs from other adapters. (7) No documentation updates included. (8) The example includes hardcoded agent configurations that likely shouldn't ship in the adapter package.
